ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the experiment belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who performed the experiment */,
  "stim_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus used in the experiment */,
  "stim_index" INTEGER /* Index of the stimulus within the block */,
  "block_index" INTEGER /* Index of the block within the session */,
  "context_name" TEXT /* Name of the context in which the experiment was performed */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., visual, auditory, combined) */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_stim_name FOREIGN KEY ("stim_name") REFERENCES stimuli ("stim_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history of the participant */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has signed the consent form */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the participant record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stim_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stim_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., image, sound) */,
  "stim_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stimulus in seconds */,
  "stim_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the stimulus (e.g., volume for sounds, brightness for images) */,
  "stim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stimulus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stimulus record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brain_activity" (
  "brain_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brain activity data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the data was recorded */,
  "eeg_data" TEXT /* EEG data recorded at that time */,
  "fmri_data" TEXT /* fMRI data recorded at that time */,
  "channel" TEXT /* EEG channel or fMRI region where the data was recorded */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the recorded data (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for data analysis (e.g., ERP, time-frequency) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the brain activity data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brain_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brain_activity_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the response belongs to */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time at which the response was made */,
  "is_response" INTEGER /* Whether the response was a real response */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Whether the response was correct */,
  "is_incorrect" INTEGER /* Whether the response was incorrect */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., button press, verbal) */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (e.g., button number, word) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the researcher record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment involved in the collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher participating in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Description of the training data used */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
